
::: {layout-ncol="2"}

[![Repo 1](https://github-stats-cards.vercel.app/api/pin/?username=pamacado&repo=options-pricing&theme=radical)](https://github.com/pamacado/options-pricing)

[![Repo 2](https://github-stats-cards.vercel.app/api/pin/?username=pamacado&repo=pdp-rl&theme=radical)](https://github.com/pamacado/pdp-rl)


:::
